user.description: Set up Apollo mmWave. On first setup an 'Apollo mmWave' dashboard is added to your sidebar with a tuning + zone-mapping tab for each detected Apollo mmWave device. Tip: reload your browser once after setup (Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+R) so the dashboard's cards finish loading. You can turn the dashboard off in the integration options, or hide it from your profile later.

data_description.auto_create_view: Registers an 'Apollo mmWave' dashboard in your sidebar with a tab per device. Turn this off if you prefer to lay out the cards yourself; the cards and strategy are still available to add manually.
